title: Trump Delays Threat to Iran, but War Negotiations Are in Early Stage
summary_full: President Trump postponed his threat to strike power plants in Iran, citing “productive conversations” with the Iranians. But officials said the talks were in an early stage and not substantive.
summary_public: President Trump postponed his threat to strike power plants in Iran, citing “productive conversations” with the Iranians. But officials said the talks were in an early stage and not substantive.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Trump postponed his threat to strike power plants in Iran
